name: The Hunt: The Rajiv Gandhi Assassination Case
original_name: The Hunt: The Rajiv Gandhi Assassination Case
overview: Follows the events leading up to the tragic 1991 assassination of former prime minister Rajiv Gandhi and the intense manhunt that unfolded after , unraveling a complex web of espionage, intelligence failures, shifting allegiances, and the profound human cost involved in the pursuit of justice.

trailers.title: The Hunt - The Rajiv Gandhi Assassination Case | Official Trailer | Nagesh Kukunoor | 4th July
